purpose: Foundational variable registry. Defines target public-source variables before scoring. Status live means the clean v0.24 scripts already fetch at least a starter version; planned means explicitly designed but not yet implemented.
principles: No sample rows in final scoring
Scoring eligibility is separate from extraction
Asset-specific interpretation comes later through asset_input_map
